name: chakra-ui-refactor
tagline: Reviews, critiques, and refactors/converts UI code (HTML, Tailwind, CSS Modules, styled-components, old Chakra) into idiomatic Chakra UI v3.
verdict: Clean, low-risk review/refactor skill: no commands run, no network or secret handling, clear severity-tiered review format and a defined refactor output format with worked before/after conversion tables for every source type. Weak spots are packaging-only: no exclusion text against the overlapping builder/migrate skills, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion text; plausibly overlaps chakra-ui-builder (new components) and chakra-ui-migrate (v2->v3) with no stated boundary.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
